title:
Try the new instruments.
Our treat ;)
text-1:
We’ve noticed that you haven’t been trading with us lately.
It’s a shame, because you left just before we launched a whole range of new trading instruments.
text-2: The IQ Option platform now offers  Digital Options, Forex, Cryptocurrency trading and CFDs. We’re so proud of each of them that we will credit
text-3: to your account just so you could try them out.
text-4: Interested? Then please contact your personal manager over e-mail or request a call-back so we can deposit the funds.
